schema.title: goose config.yaml (representative shape)
schema.description: Representative shape of goose's config.yaml (block/goose); minimum fields needed to drive `goose acp` from a foreign client. Not an exhaustive schema; per-knob provenance is recorded in each Knob's description as `[env]` or `[file: yaml]`.

knobs.name: GOOSE_PROVIDER
knobs.description: [env] Selecting provider (e.g. openai, anthropic). Read from the GOOSE_PROVIDER environment variable when set; falls through to goose's own config.yaml default.

knobs.name: GOOSE_MODEL
knobs.description: [env] Model id passed to the selected provider. Read from the GOOSE_MODEL environment variable when set; falls through to goose's own config.yaml default. zoder's GooseProviderEnv seam bridge uses this env var on the spawned `goose acp` child.

knobs.name: providers
knobs.description: [file: yaml] Provider entries declared in goose's config.yaml (`providers:` section). Each item is an object with provider-specific auth + endpoint fields. Foreign clients (zoder) typically override this via env rather than writing to the file.

knobs.name: default_provider
knobs.description: [file: yaml] Default provider id (from `default_provider` / first item in `providers:`) used when neither GOOSE_PROVIDER nor a foreign-client override is set.

knobs.name: OPENAI_API_KEY
knobs.description: [env] OpenAI API key. Resolved at request time from the OPENAI_API_KEY env var. Marked `secret = true` so client UIs redact it. zoder's GooseProviderEnv seam sets this on the spawned child when bridging a free/subscription provider into goose.

knobs.name: ANTHROPIC_API_KEY
knobs.description: [env] Anthropic API key. Resolved at request time from the ANTHROPIC_API_KEY env var. Marked `secret = true`.

knobs.name: recipes
knobs.description: [file: yaml] Goose-specific extension: `recipes:` section in config.yaml mapping recipe id to recipe parameters. NOT modeled as a Knob kind — see the descriptor-level `extensions.goose.recipes` field for the full shape and value-type info.

knobs.name: scheduler
knobs.description: [file: yaml] Goose-specific extension: `scheduler:` section in config.yaml (recurring / one-shot scheduling of recipes). See the descriptor-level `extensions.goose.scheduler` field for the full shape.

block.goose.recipes.description: Vendor extension: full recipes object from config.yaml. The descriptor model deliberately keeps `recipes`/`scheduler` at the descriptor-extension layer (NOT as core knobs) because no other conformant implementation needs them; uplifting to core would require a new conformance level.

instructions.description: The natural-language instructions executed when the recipe is invoked.

parameters.description: Recipe parameter schema (name + type + required + default).

block.goose.scheduler.description: Vendor extension: recipe-scheduling configuration. `cron` is a 5-field cron expression in the user's local timezone; `one_shot` is an RFC3339 timestamp.

recipe.description: Recipe id (matches a key in `recipes:`) to invoke on the schedule.
